quote: The Trades Show is an amazing way to learn about artisanship, creativity and craftwork!... Briana asked such wonderful and probing questions!
Really great show!!! I love that you're taking it on the road and recording with people in their space.
Such an interesting episode and really beautiful work.
I'm watching this one because I mostly listened to it the first time and I'm getting a lot out of it the second time around and with the visual.
The production and editing is great.
